content: I'm feeling really grateful for my family right now. My wife and kids are such a blessing, and I feel so lucky to have them in my life.
That's wonderful to hear, Hayden. Family is such an important part of our lives, and it's great that you're appreciating them. What's been the best part of being a husband and father for you?

I think it's just the everyday moments we share together. Whether we're playing games, going on outings, or just hanging out at home, I love spending time with my family. And as a video game streamer, I love being able to share my passion with them and involve them in my work.

That's great, Hayden. It's wonderful that you're able to share your passion with your family and involve them in your work. How do your kids like watching you stream, and do they have any favorite games that they like to play with you?

They love watching me stream, and they're always so excited to see me play their favorite games. They're really into Minecraft right now, and we love playing together as a family. It's such a great way to bond and have fun together.

That sounds like so much fun, Hayden. It's great that you're able to spend quality time with your family and create memories that will last a lifetime. What's your favorite type of content to stream, and do you have any upcoming projects or collaborations that you're excited about?

I love streaming a variety of games, but I think my favorite is still Fortnite. I've been playing it for years, and I love the competitive aspect of it. As for upcoming projects, I'm actually working on a new series with a fellow streamer - we're going to be playing through a bunch of classic games and sharing our thoughts and reactions.
That sounds like a great project, Hayden. I'm sure your fans will love it. What inspired you to start streaming, and what do you hope to achieve with your channel?

I started streaming because I love playing games and I wanted to share that passion with others. I hope to build a community of like-minded people who share my interests and values, and to create content that inspires and entertains them.

That's a great goal, Hayden. It's wonderful that you're passionate about building a community and creating content that resonates with others. What do you like to do in your free time, aside from streaming and spending time with your family?

I love gardening and mushroom foraging. There's something about being in nature and growing my own food that really resonates with me. And I also enjoy speedcubing and triathlon training - it's a great way to challenge myself and stay active.
